_doc: Per-project coverage thresholds. Each entry is a project directory; tests for that project must measure at least its threshold or `make test` fails hard. Generated parser code (compiler/parser/osprey_*.go) is excluded before measurement. To raise a threshold after improving coverage, run `make ratchet` — it updates each project's threshold to (measured - 1) for rounding margin. Aim is 90% for every project; see docs/plans/coverage-to-90-percent.md.
